title: Becka Baker Elected to Serve as Board Vice Chair
summary: An update to BSNC’s Board Officers: The BSNC Board of Directors has elected Becka Baker to serve as Vice Chair of the Board. The position of Vice Chair was previously held by Cindy Massie, who now serves as BSNC President. Baker has served on the BSNC Board since 2018. BSNC’s Officers are as follows...

title: Geographical Problems: Interview with Artist Justin Levesque
summary: Curator, Jaime DeSimone interviews Portland-based interdisciplinary artist Justin Levesque to discuss his work on Geographical Problems. The post Geographical Problems: Interview with Artist Justin Levesque appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: December 2023 Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: December 12, 2023 SUMMARY Good afternoon and Happy Holidays! Thank you to the board and employees for helping make HEA successful this past year. I hope we end the year with plenty of time spent with family, and friends, and continuing to serve our community. I am proud of the many employees who volunteer their time and money for the benefit of our local schools, sports teams, and non-profit organizations. Those efforts do not go unnoticed. Let’s take time to pause, reflect on our many blessings, and to recognize those who play a significant role in our cooperative. I look forward to the upcoming year and all the opportunities that it presents. It has been busy the last several weeks with Employee Updates, and several oth...
